errors.error: The AI service is temporarily overloaded. Please try again in a moment.
errors.meaning: Anthropic API returned overloaded error instead of routing to configured Codex model — likely model resolution fell back to Opus which was rate-limited.
errors.suggestedFix: Verify the job's model field resolves to Codex (OpenAI) and not Anthropic; re-run manually or wait for next scheduled run at 07:35 CDT.
